mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_form_definition WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM rp_form_definition WHERE code = #{code} AND flag = '启用' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_form_definition (id, code, name, description, schema_json, version, status, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{schemaJson}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
